mt_raw: The stability of the linked exchange rate system has been underpinned by the solid foundations built over the years. As noted in the summary by the International Monetary Fund in its External Sector Report 2020, the credibility of the linked exchange rate system is based on highly transparent operational rules, ample fiscal and foreign exchange reserves, robust financial regulation, a flexible economy, and prudent fiscal policies. At the same time, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) swiftly dispels rumors and timely provides the latest information on facts and data through close engagement with the industry and effective communication with the public via traditional and social media. The HKMA also continues to enhance its supervisory capabilities by leveraging the latest technology and data analytics to flexibly respond to the latest market conditions and emerging risks.

src_raw: 雖然疫情對經濟造成沉重壓力，但銀行體系維持穩健，資本及流動資金充裕。於2020年底，本地銀行的資本充足比率為20.7%，遠高於國際最低要求的8%。大型銀行的平均流動性覆蓋比率亦遠高於法定最低要求的100%，於2020年第4季達到155.1%。受疫情影響，銀行的資產質素略為轉差，特定分類貸款比率於2020年底上升至0.9%，但仍屬穩健並遠低於自2000年以來的長期平均水平1.8%。
mt_raw: Although the epidemic has created significant pressure on the economy, the banking system remains stable, with ample capital and liquidity. As of the end of 2020, the capital adequacy ratio of local banks was 20.7%, far exceeding the international minimum requirement of 8%. The average liquidity coverage ratio of large banks was also far above the statutory minimum requirement of 100%, reaching 155.1% in the fourth quarter of 2020. Affected by the epidemic, the asset quality of banks deteriorated slightly, with the specific classified loan ratio rising to 0.9% at the end of 2020, but still remained stable and far below the long-term average level of 1.8% since 2000.

src_raw: 銀行體系在經濟與社會中扮演重要的金融中介角色。年內金管局一方面繼續重點監管銀行的信用及流動性風險，另一方面亦密切留意疫情對銀行營運的影響，並採取多項措施，確保銀行體系能繼續提供基本服務，以及提供貸款支持經濟。金管局在3月下調逆周期緩衝資本比率100基點至1%，又在4月調低監管儲備水平。這些措施為銀行體系合共釋放約1萬億港元的借貸空間。
mt_raw: The banking system plays a crucial role as a financial intermediary in the economy and society. Throughout the year, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) focused on closely regulating banks' credit and liquidity risks while also closely monitoring the impact of the pandemic on banking operations. The HKMA implemented multiple measures to ensure the banking system could continue providing essential services and offering loan support to the economy. In March, the HKMA reduced the countercyclical capital buffer ratio by 100 basis points to 1%, and in April, it lowered regulatory reserve levels. These measures collectively freed up approximately 100 billion Hong Kong dollars in lending capacity for the banking system.

src_raw: 我們深知中小企在當前的經濟環境下或會面對資金周轉壓力。因此，金管局聯同我們在2019年成立的銀行業中小企貸款協調機制推出多輪紓困措施，包括「預先批核還息不還本」計劃，將合資格企業的所有貸款本金還款延期6個月。截至2020年底，銀行共批出超過58,000宗貸款展期及其他支援措施的個案，涉資超過7,400億港元。鑑於疫情反覆，金管局因應情況將「預先批核還息不還本」計劃展期，並於2021年3月將計劃延長至2021年10月底。香港按揭證券有限公司亦在其中小企融資擔保計劃下推出「百分百擔保特惠貸款」，以紓緩中小企支付僱員薪金及租金的負擔。截至2020年底，共批出超過25,000宗申請，涉資約400億港元。該計劃在2021年第1季作出優化，申請期限亦延長至2021年12月31日。年內銀行亦批出超過28,000宗紓困措施申請，協助個人客戶的資金周轉，涉資440億港元。銀行業同心協力，支持企業及個人客戶，共渡時艱，實在令人鼓舞。
mt_raw: We are fully aware that small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) may face cash flow pressures under the current economic environment. Therefore, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), together with our SME loan coordination mechanism established in 2019, introduced multiple relief measures, including the "PPPHS" program, which deferred the principal repayments of all eligible enterprises for six months. By the end of 2020, banks had processed over 58,000 cases of loan deferrals and other support measures, involving over HK$740 billion. In response to the recurring pandemic, the HKMA extended the "PPPHS" program, prolonging it until the end of October 2021 in March 2021. Hong Kong Mortgage Corporation also launched the "Special 100% Loan Guarantee" under its SME financing guarantee program to alleviate SMEs' burdens in paying employee salaries and rent. By the end of 2020, over 25,000 applications had been approved, involving approximately HK$40 billion. The program was optimized in the first quarter of 2021, with the application deadline extended to December 31, 2021. Throughout the year, banks also processed over 28,000 relief measure applications for individual customers, assisting with cash flow needs involving HK$44 billion. The banking industry's united efforts in supporting both enterprises and individual customers through these challenging times are truly encouraging.

src_raw: 隨着科技長足發展，銀行業的經營環境亦急速轉變。因此，金管局的工作不僅限於應對當前的挑戰，亦要放眼未來，擴大人才庫，以配合銀行業的日後發展。我們與香港銀行公會及香港銀行學會聯合展開「提升未來銀行業人才的專業能力」研究計劃，評估銀行業未來幾年的潛在人才缺口，並為銀行規劃清晰的路線圖，以期未雨綢繆，改善人才供應的情況。我們又推出「銀行業人才起動計劃」，為本地大學的應屆畢業生提供為期6個月的實習機會及銀行業相關的特定培訓，藉以為業界培育人才。在本港勞工市場的嚴峻時期推出此計劃，亦正好為有志加入銀行業的年青人提供機會。
mt_raw: With the rapid development of technology, the operating environment of the banking industry has also changed rapidly. Therefore, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's work is not only about addressing current challenges but also looking ahead to expand the talent pool to meet the future needs of the banking industry. We have launched a research project, "Enhancing the Professional Competence of Future Banking Talent," in collaboration with the Hong Kong Bankers Association and the Hong Kong Institute of Bankers, to assess potential talent gaps in the banking industry over the next few years and provide banks with a clear roadmap to improve talent supply. We have also introduced the Banking Talent Programme, offering recent graduates from local universities a six-month internship and specialized training related to the banking industry, aiming to cultivate talent for the sector. Launching this program during a challenging period in the local labor market also provides opportunities for young people interested in joining the banking industry.

src_raw: 第一個範疇是推動綠色及可持續金融。自2019年5月推出分三階段進行的措施以來，相關工作已取得理想進展。我們在2020年完成對47間銀行的「綠色基準」評估，發表白皮書及發出通告，就銀行管理氣候風險提供指引及分享經驗。我們亦全力推進第二階段的工作，制定銀行業管理氣候風險的監管架構。此外，我們會致力在2025年或之前按照氣候相關財務披露工作小組的建議，要求銀行就氣候相關資料作出披露。這將使香港成為亞洲區內首個作出相關具體要求的地區。
mt_raw: The first area of focus is promoting green and sustainable finance. Since the launch of measures to be implemented in three phases in May 2019, good progress has been made in related work. We completed the “Greenness Baseline” assessment of 47 banks in 2020, published a white paper, and issued a circular providing guidance and sharing experience on banks’ management of climate-related risks. We are also fully pushing forward the work of the second phase, formulating a regulatory framework for the banking sector’s management of climate-related risks. In addition, we will strive to require banks to make disclosures on climate-related data by 2025 or earlier, in accordance with the recommendations of the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures. This will make Hong Kong the first region in Asia to make such specific requirements.

mt_raw: To further develop Hong Kong's green finance ecosystem, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has been assisting the government in issuing green bonds, with the recent second batch of government green bonds receiving significant interest from international investors. src_raw: 為鞏固香港作為區內綠色及可持續金融樞紐，我們整體策略的其中一環，是與本地其他監管機構及國際社會合作，推進綠色金融議程。在本地方面，金管局聯同其他監管機構成立綠色和可持續金融跨機構督導小組，協調金融業的相關措施。該小組已經制定策略性計劃，促進香港的綠色及可持續金融的發展。在國際方面，金管局應國際金融公司的邀請，成為亞洲區域創始成員及首個區域執行理事，與其合力推動「綠色商業銀行聯盟」。聯盟旨在於全球金融市場推動綠色銀行業，並由亞洲開始，逐步擴展至其他地區。
mt_raw: To consolidate Hong Kong’s position as a regional hub for green and sustainable finance, one aspect of our overall strategy is to collaborate with other local regulators and the international community to advance the green finance agenda. Locally, the HKMA, together with other regulators, has established the Cross-agency Steering Group on Green and Sustainable Finance to coordinate relevant initiatives in the financial industry. The Group has formulated a strategic plan to promote the development of green and sustainable finance in Hong Kong. Internationally, the HKMA has accepted the invitation of the International Finance Corporation to become a founding member and the first regional executive council member for the Asia region, working with it to promote the Alliance for Green Commercial Banks. The Alliance aims to promote green banking in global financial markets, starting in Asia and gradually expanding to other regions.

src_raw: 過去一年清楚顯示，金融科技能夠擴展我們的「工具箱」，以應對突如其來的衝擊。面對新冠病毒疫情，電子支付渠道發揮了前所未見的作用。自2018年9月推出快速支付系統「轉數快」至2020年底期間，「轉數快」已錄得690萬個登記賬戶。即使在社交距離措施的限制下，公眾仍能利用「轉數快」這個安全快捷及穩妥的方式收付及轉撥資金，令「轉數快」的平均每日交易量在2020年急增2.3倍。我們亦一直與政府合作，將「轉數快」的應用範圍擴大至繳付更多種政府及公共服務帳單。
mt_raw: The past year has clearly demonstrated that fintech can expand our "toolkit" to cope with unexpected shocks. In response to the coronavirus pandemic, electronic payment channels played an unprecedented role. From the launch of the Faster Payment System "FPS" in September 2018 until the end of 2020, FPS had already recorded 6.9 million registered accounts. Even under the restrictions of social distancing measures, the public could still use FPS - a secure, fast and reliable method - to make payments and transfer funds, leading to a 2.3-fold surge in FPS's average daily transaction volume in 2020. We have also continued to collaborate with the government to expand FPS's application scope to cover more types of government and public service bills.

src_raw: 此外，金融科技亦有助銀行提供更多元化及便利的銀行客戶服務。獲金管局發牌的所有8間虛擬銀行年內已經全數在香港開業。截至2020年底，在虛擬銀行開設的帳戶共有420,000個，總計客戶存款150億港元。其中部分虛擬銀行已經率先使用新類型數據進行信貸評估，以開拓新的客戶群及促進普及金融。金管局繼續推動在香港發展更具規模及更多元化的合規科技生態圈，作為「銀行易」措施的一部分，從而精簡監管規定，提升客戶體驗。除透過刊發通訊系列，以提高業界對合規科技應用的認知外，金管局亦發表白皮書，載述加快銀行業採用合規科技的兩年計劃。另外，金管局又展開「商業數據通」項目，以便中小企利用自身的數碼足跡更便捷地獲取銀行融資。
mt_raw: In addition, fintech also helps banks provide more diversified and convenient banking services to customers. All eight virtual banks licensed by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) have already commenced operations in Hong Kong this year. As of the end of 2020, a total of 420,000 accounts had been opened with virtual banks, with total customer deposits amounting to HKD 15 billion. Some of these virtual banks have already started using new types of data for credit assessment, aiming to tap into new customer segments and promote financial inclusion. The HKMA continues to promote the development of a larger and more diversified compliance technology ecosystem in Hong Kong as part of the "Banking Easy" initiative, in order to streamline regulatory requirements and enhance customer experience. In addition to publishing a series of communications to raise industry awareness of compliance technology applications, the HKMA has also issued a white paper outlining a two-year plan to accelerate the adoption of compliance technology in the banking sector. Furthermore, the HKMA has launched the "Commercial Data Interchange" project to enable small and medium-sized enterprises to more conveniently access banking financing by leveraging their own digital footprints.

src_raw: 金融科技面貌日新月異，科技應用亦日趨普及，金管局需繼續秉持嚴謹的監管。為此，我們推出「網絡防衛計劃2.0」，以提高銀行的網絡防衛能力。我們亦加強對科技風險管理的現場審查，並制定監管框架，評估運用創新信用風險評估方法的個人貸款產品的信用風險。金管局亦展開監管科技應用的三年計劃，以提升監管流程的成效及前瞻性。我們現正進行的有關工作包括更有效地利用數據及科技來加強反洗錢方面的監管。
mt_raw: The landscape of financial technology is evolving rapidly, with technological applications becoming increasingly widespread. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) must continue to uphold rigorous regulation. To this end, we have launched the "Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative 2.0" to enhance banks' cyber defense capabilities. We have also strengthened on-site reviews of technology risk management and established a regulatory framework to assess the credit risk of personal loan products utilizing innovative credit risk assessment methods. The HKMA has also initiated a three-year plan to apply regulatory technology, aiming to improve the effectiveness and forward-looking nature of regulatory processes. Current efforts include more effectively leveraging data and technology to strengthen anti-money laundering regulations.

src_raw: 面對新冠病毒疫情，香港經濟在2020 年連續第二年收縮，並錄得歷年來最嚴重的跌幅。消費及旅遊相關行業尤其受到重創，其收縮幅度較整體經濟更大。與此同時，勞工市場急速惡化，通脹有所緩和。政府及金管局為應對嚴峻的經濟環境，推出歷來最大規模的紓困措施以支持經濟。新冠病毒疫苗接種可望使經濟活動回復正常，預期2021年經濟會恢復增長，然而經濟復甦的力度及步伐仍受疫情發展以及疫苗供應、覆蓋範圍和成效等眾多不明朗因素影響。
mt_raw: Facing the COVID-19 pandemic, Hong Kong's economy contracted for the second consecutive year in 2020, recording its worst-ever decline. Consumer and tourism-related industries were particularly hard hit, contracting more sharply than the overall economy. Meanwhile, the labor market deteriorated rapidly, while inflation eased. To address the challenging economic environment, the government and the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) launched the largest-ever relief measures to support the economy. The rollout of COVID-19 vaccines is expected to restore normal economic activity, with economic growth anticipated to rebound in 2021. However, the strength and pace of the economic recovery remain subject to numerous uncertainties, including the evolution of the pandemic, vaccine supply, coverage, and effectiveness.

terms: {'新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '金融業': 'financial sector'}
src_raw: 受新冠病毒疫情打擊，香港經濟在2020年收縮6.1%，是連續第二年收縮，亦是有紀錄以來最嚴重的年度跌幅（表1）。經濟活動急跌主要是本地需求急劇收縮所致（圖1）。疫情爆發及相應的社交距離措施令本地消費活動受到重創。由於營商環境轉差，整體投資支出亦明顯減少。對外方面，儘管疫情導致供應鏈受干擾及全球需求萎縮，但部分受惠於中國內地迅速恢復生產和經濟活動，全年合計香港貨物出口僅略為下降。相比之下，由於封城、關閉邊境及旅客流量限制令全球旅遊業陷入停頓，所以香港服務輸出嚴重受挫。本地及轉口帶動的需求疲弱，亦令貨物進口及服務輸入轉差。由於進口總額下跌步伐較出口快，淨出口（貿易順差）為本地生產總值帶來支持（圖1）。按經濟行業分析，消費及旅遊相關行業，例如零售、住宿及膳食服務業受到的打擊尤其嚴重，收縮情況較整體經濟更差，而金融業則溫和增長。
mt_raw: Hit by the coronavirus pandemic, Hong Kong's economy contracted by 6.1% in 2020, marking the second consecutive year of contraction and the worst annual decline on record (Table 1). The sharp drop in economic activity was mainly due to a sudden contraction in local demand (Figure 1). The outbreak of the virus and the corresponding social distancing measures severely impacted local consumption. Due to the deteriorating business environment, overall investment spending also significantly decreased. Externally, although the pandemic disrupted supply chains and caused a global decline in demand, some benefits were derived from the rapid recovery of production and economic activities in mainland China, resulting in only a slight decline in Hong Kong's total goods exports for the year. In contrast, Hong Kong's service exports were severely affected due to the lockdowns, border closures, and travel restrictions that brought global tourism to a standstill. Weak demand driven by local and re-export activities also led to a decline in goods imports and service inputs. As the decline in imports was faster than that of exports, net exports (trade surplus) provided support to the local gross domestic product (Figure 1). By industry analysis, consumption and tourism-related sectors, such as retail, accommodation, and food services, were particularly hard hit, experiencing a contraction worse than that of the overall economy, while the financial sector showed moderate growth.

terms: {'流動性': 'Liquidity', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector', '防疫抗疫基金': 'Anti-Epidemic Fund', '預算': 'budget requests'}
src_raw: 政府為應對疫情，透過2020至21年度《財政預算案》迅速推出歷來最大規模的紓困措施，並從「防疫抗疫基金」發放4輪補助，合共超過3,000億港元。這些措施包括向合資格居民發放一筆過10,000港元現金、透過「保就業」計劃提供工資補貼，以及為受疫情重創的行業提供一筆過資助、寬減租金及豁免收費。金管局則採取三管齊下的方式支持銀行業，從而支撐實體經濟。有關措施包括與銀行業積極協調，減輕企業及家庭的資金周轉壓力，釋放緩衝以提高銀行的借貸能力，並確保銀行有足夠流動性支持本地經濟活動。
mt_raw: The government, to address the epidemic, swiftly launched the largest-ever relief measures through the 2020-21 Budget, and disbursed four rounds of subsidies from the Anti-Epidemic Fund, totaling over HK$3,000 billion. These measures included a one-off cash payment of HK$10,000 to eligible residents, providing wage subsidies through the "Employment Retention Scheme," and providing one-off grants, rent reductions, and fee waivers for industries severely affected by the epidemic. The Monetary Authority adopted a three-pronged approach to support the banking sector, thereby supporting the real economy. These measures included actively coordinating with the banking sector to alleviate the financial turnover pressure of businesses and families, releasing buffers to enhance banks' lending capacity, and ensuring that banks have sufficient liquidity to support local economic activities.

terms: {'全球經濟': 'world economy', '名義工資': 'Nominal wage', '基本通脹率': 'underlying inflation rate', '消費物價指數': 'consumer price inflation', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '通脹': 'inflation'}
src_raw: 通脹壓力在2020年明顯減弱。剔除政府一次性紓困措施的影響，基本通脹率放緩至1.3%，是2009年全球金融危機以來最小的升幅。基本食品（尤其新鮮豬肉）的價格壓力明顯減退；而自行烹煮以外，由於飲食業提供大幅度折扣，所以外出用膳的價格在下半年亦有所下降。隨着早前新簽訂的私人住宅租金回落，消費物價指數租金項目的增長亦回軟（圖2）。更廣泛而言，由於名義工資增長減慢及商業樓宇租金偏軟，本地營商成本壓力減少；而在疲弱的全球經濟狀況下，進口價格通脹有所緩和。
mt_raw: Inflationary pressures eased noticeably in 2020. Excluding the effect of the government’s one-off relief measures, the underlying inflation rate slowed to 1.3%, the smallest increase since the global financial crisis in 2009. Price pressures on basic food items (particularly fresh pork) diminished significantly; and the prices of dining out also fell in the second half of the year, as the catering industry offered substantial discounts in addition to cooking at home. With the recent signing of new private residential rental agreements leading to a fall in rents, the growth in the rental component of the Consumer Price Index also softened (Figure 2). More broadly, local business operating costs decreased due to slower nominal wage growth and softer commercial building rents; and import price inflation eased against the backdrop of a weak global economic environment.

terms: {'勞工市場': 'labour market', '名義工資': 'Nominal wage', '沙士': 'SARS', '私營機構': 'private-sector', '經季節性調整': 'seasonally adjusted'}
src_raw: 勞工市場在2020年急速惡化。經季節性調整的失業率年內由3.3%飆升至6.6%，為16年的高位（圖3），其中零售、住宿及膳食服務等受疫情重創行業的失業率達到10%以上。就業不足率亦於8月升至3.8%，為沙士疫情後的高位。部分由於經濟狀況急速惡化造成的周期性反應，勞動人口參與率輕微減少。總就業人數（圖3）及私營機構職位空缺急跌，反映整體勞工需求進一步收縮。名義工資及收入增長進一步放緩。政府推出「保就業」計劃，為僱主提供有時限的財政支援以保留僱員，使勞工市場獲得一定程度的支持。
mt_raw: The labor market deteriorated rapidly in 2020. The seasonally adjusted unemployment rate rose from 3.3% to 6.6% within the year, reaching a 16-year high (Figure 3), with unemployment rates in sectors severely impacted by the pandemic, such as retail, accommodation, and food and beverage services, exceeding 10%. The underemployment rate also climbed to 3.8% in August, the highest since the SARS outbreak. Partly due to the cyclical response caused by the rapid deterioration of the economic situation, the labor force participation rate slightly declined. Total employment numbers (Figure 3) and private sector job vacancies plummeted, reflecting a contraction in overall labor demand. Nominal wage and income growth continued to slow. The government introduced the "Job Retention" plan, providing employers with time-limited financial support to retain employees, offering some support to the labor market.

terms: {'中央銀行': 'central banking', '恒生指數': 'Hang Seng Index', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '首次公開招股': 'initial public offerings'}
src_raw: 隨着新冠病毒疫情爆發，恒生指數在首季急跌至3年低位。繼各國中央銀行及政府推出大型支持措施後，股市在第2季及第3季略為回穩（圖4）。由於新冠病毒疫苗研發出現突破，股市於接近年底時重拾一些上升動力。恒生指數於年底收報27,231點，全年計錄得3.4%跌幅。受惠於內地企業在香港的第二上市活動，2020年本港首次公開招股集資總額約4,000億港元，以集資額計全球排名第二。
mt_raw: Following the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Hang Seng Index plummeted to a three-year low in the first quarter. After central banks and governments around the world launched large-scale support measures, the stock market stabilized slightly in the second and third quarters (Figure 4). Driven by breakthroughs in the development of COVID-19 vaccines, the stock market regained some upward momentum towards the end of the year. The Hang Seng Index closed at 27,231 points at the end of the year, recording an overall decrease of 3.4% for the year. Benefiting from the secondary listing activities of mainland Chinese companies in Hong Kong, Hong Kong’s total IPO fundraising in 2020 was approximately HK$400 billion, ranking second globally in terms of funds raised.

src_raw: 部分受到超低利率所支持，住宅物業市場在2020年大致平穩（圖4）。整體樓價及成交量較前一年均無大變動。然而，由於家庭住戶入息減少，置業負擔能力更為偏緊。另一方面，非住宅物業市場進一步轉弱，物業價格錄得不同程度跌幅，成交量亦見底。受經濟下滑及空置率上升的影響，寫字樓及零售物業租金大幅下跌。鑑於2019年以來非住宅物業市場已出現大幅調整，並預期會持續受壓，加上考慮到經濟基調及外圍環境等其他因素，金管局於8月調整非住宅物業的逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施。政府因應市場需求回落，亦於11月撤銷購置非住宅物業的雙倍從價印花稅這項需求管理措施。
mt_raw: Partly supported by ultra-low interest rates, the residential property market remained largely stable in 2020 (Figure 4). Overall property prices and transaction volumes showed little change compared to the previous year. However, due to a decline in household incomes, affordability for home purchases became tighter. On the other hand, the non-residential property market further weakened, with property prices declining to varying degrees and transaction volumes hitting a trough. Affected by economic contraction and rising vacancy rates, office and retail property rents fell sharply. Given that the non-residential property market had already experienced significant adjustments since 2019 and was expected to continue facing pressure, and considering other factors such as the economic outlook and external environment, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority adjusted the countercyclical macroprudential measures for non-residential properties in August. In response to the decline in market demand, the government also revoked the double-rate stamp duty on non-residential property purchases, a demand management measure, in November.

terms: {'實質本地生產總值': 'real GDP', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '私營機構': 'private-sector'}
src_raw: 新冠病毒疫苗接種可望使經濟活動回復正常，預期香港經濟在2021年（全年合計）重拾正增長，然而經濟復甦的力度及步伐仍受疫情發展及疫苗供應、覆蓋範圍和成效等眾多不明朗因素影響。具體而言，疫苗廣泛接種需時，因此本地經濟在2021年早段仍面對相當程度的挑戰。對外方面，預計內地經濟會進一步增強，並為香港貨物及服務輸出帶來支持，然而其他主要經濟體的復甦步伐將取決於其大規模接種疫苗計劃的成效。政府預測2021年實質本地生產總值增長率介乎3.5至5.5%之間，與國際組織及私營機構分析員對香港最新的增長預測平均4.4%相符。
mt_raw: Vaccination against the novel coronavirus is expected to restore normal economic activities, and Hong Kong's economy is anticipated to resume positive growth for the full year of 2021. However, the pace and strength of the economic recovery remain subject to numerous uncertainties, including the development of the pandemic, vaccine supply, coverage, and effectiveness. Specifically, since widespread vaccination will take time, the local economy will still face significant challenges in the early part of 2021. Externally, it is expected that the mainland economy will continue to strengthen and provide support for Hong Kong's exports of goods and services. However, the recovery pace of other major economies will depend on the effectiveness of their large-scale vaccination programs. The government forecasts that the real GDP growth rate of Hong Kong in 2021 will be between 3.5 and 5.5 percent, consistent with the average growth forecast of 4.4 percent by international organizations and private sector analysts.

src_raw: 鑑於環球及本地經濟狀況仍具挑戰，預期2021年的通脹壓力將維持輕微。此外，早前新簽訂私人住宅租金回落的傳遞效應，將繼續令本地通脹受到抑制。市場共識預測2021年整體通脹率為1.5%，而政府預期整體及基本通脹率分別為1.6%及1%。由於經濟前景在2021年早段仍具挑戰，加上私營機構分析員預計2021年全年失業率仍會在約5.9%的偏高水平，因此短期內勞工市場將繼續受壓。
mt_raw: Given the ongoing challenges in global and local economic conditions, inflationary pressures in 2021 are expected to remain mild. Furthermore, the pass-through effect of the recent decline in private residential rents will continue to suppress local inflation. Market consensus forecasts an overall inflation rate of 1.5% for 2021, while the government expects overall and core inflation rates to be 1.6% and 1%, respectively. Due to the continued challenges in the economic outlook during the early part of 2021, combined with private sector analysts' expectations that the unemployment rate will remain at a relatively high level of around 5.9% for the entire year of 2021, the labor market is expected to remain under pressure in the short term.

mt_raw: In 2020, the banking system’s balance sheet expanded by 5.7%. Due to the economic downturn, loan growth slowed to 1.2% during the year, compared to an increase of 6.7% in 2019; among these, loans used in Hong Kong increased by 2.2%, while loans used outside of Hong Kong saw a slight increase of 0.1%, and trade financing decreased by 6.2%. In 2020, loans related to mainland China saw a slight decrease of 0.2%, compared to a 7.4% increase in 2019.

src_raw: 新冠病毒疫情影響下，年內銀行體系資產質素略為下降，但以歷史及國際標準計仍然維持良好。特定分類貸款比率由2019年底的0.57%上升至2020年底的0.90%，逾期及經重組貸款比率於同期由0.34%上升至0.57%（圖10）。中國內地相關貸款的特定分類貸款比率由 2019 年底的 0.75% 上升至 2020 年底的 0.96%。住宅按揭貸款及信用卡貸款的拖欠比率仍然處於低位，分別為0.04%及0.27%（圖11）。
mt_raw: Under the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, the asset quality of the banking system declined slightly during the year, but remained sound by historical and international standards. The specific classification loan ratio increased from 0.57% at the end of 2019 to 0.90% at the end of 2020, while the overdue and restructured loan ratio rose from 0.34% to 0.57% during the same period (Figure 10). The specific classification loan ratio for loans related to Mainland China increased from 0.75% at the end of 2019 to 0.96% at the end of 2020. The delinquency ratios for residential mortgage loans and credit card loans remained at low levels, at 0.04% and 0.27% respectively (Figure 11).

src_raw: 儘管新冠病毒疫情增加不確定因素，港元外匯及貨幣市場運作暢順有序。受到大量股票相關的資金流入所支持，港元匯率於2020 年內大部分時間偏強，而強方兌換保證多次被觸發。聯繫匯率制度是香港金融體系的基石，充分展現強大的抵禦衝擊的能力。
mt_raw: Despite the uncertainties caused by the COVID-19 pandemic, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange and money markets have operated smoothly and in an orderly manner. Supported by substantial inflows of funds related to equities, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate remained generally strong for most of 2020, with the strong-side exchange rate guarantee being triggered multiple times. The linked exchange rate system is the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s financial system, fully demonstrating its strong resilience against shocks.

terms: {'匯價': 'exchange value', '美元儲備': 'US dollar reserves', '貨幣基礎': 'Monetary Base', '貨幣政策': 'monetary policy', '貨幣穩定': 'Monetary Stability'}
src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: The main objective of Hong Kong’s monetary policy is to maintain monetary stability, which means ensuring the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate, keeping the exchange rate of the Hong Kong dollar against the US dollar within the range of HK$7.75 to HK$7.85 per US dollar. This monetary system primarily employs a currency issuance bureau system, stipulating that the US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund must provide at least 100 percent support for the monetary base; if the monetary base changes, the US dollar reserves must also be adjusted accordingly, matching 100 percent of the changes in the monetary base.

- 負債證明書（為3間發鈔銀行發行的銀行紙幣提供十足支持）

- Certificates of Indebtedness (providing full backing for banknotes issued by the three note-issuing banks)
- Government-issued currency notes and coins
- The aggregate balances of clearing accounts maintained with the HKMA (i.e. total balances)
- Exchange Fund Bills and Bonds issued by the HKMA on behalf of the Government.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。當強方（或弱方）兌換保證被觸發，金管局會應銀行要求，按每美元兌7.75港元向銀行沽出港元、買入美元（或按7.85港元買入港元、沽出美元），使總結餘增加（或減少），令港元利率下跌（或上升），從而促使港元匯率回復到7.75至7.85 的兌換範圍。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority maintains the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate through the automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and its firm commitment to honoring exchange rate guarantees. When a strong (or weak) exchange rate guarantee is triggered, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, upon request from banks, will sell Hong Kong dollars and buy US dollars from banks at a rate of HK$7.75 per US dollar (or buy Hong Kong dollars and sell US dollars at a rate of HK$7.85), increasing (or decreasing) the aggregate balance, thereby lowering (or raising) Hong Kong dollar interest rates, and thus bringing the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate back within the exchange rate range of 7.75 to 7.85.

src_raw: 隨着3月全球爆發新冠病毒疫情，避險情緒下環球投資者增持美元，令美元資金狀況明顯收緊。在聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）下，由於港元利率受同期美元利率影響，美元流動性緊張令香港貨幣狀況收緊。儘管其後美國聯邦儲備局實施流動資金計劃，美元資金壓力有所紓緩，但由於股票相關需求及季結效應，令香港貨幣狀況仍維持偏緊。而港元需求殷切，加上港元與美元的正息差刺激套息交易活動，促使港元匯率偏向強方兌換保證匯率（圖1），強方兌換保證最終於4月被觸發。其後新股集資活動暢旺，以及「滬港通」與「深港通」下的南向資金帶動股票相關資金流入，令港元一直維持接近7.75水平，並導致強方兌換保證在2020年內多次被觸發。強方兌換保證在4月21日至10月28日期間合共被觸發85次，累計資金流入3,835億港元。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2020年全年運作正常。
mt_raw: With the global outbreak of the novel coronavirus in March, risk-aversion led global investors to increase their holdings of US dollars, tightening US dollar liquidity significantly. Under the Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS), Hong Kong dollar interest rates are influenced by corresponding US dollar interest rates, so the tightness of US dollar liquidity tightened Hong Kong's monetary conditions. Although the US Federal Reserve later implemented liquidity programs, easing US dollar funding pressures, Hong Kong's monetary conditions remained tight due to stock-related demand and end-of-quarter effects. The strong demand for Hong Kong dollars, combined with the positive interest rate differential between Hong Kong dollars and US dollars, stimulated carry trade activities, pushing the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate toward the strong-side exchange rate guarantee (Figure 1). The strong-side exchange rate guarantee was ultimately triggered in April. Subsequently, robust initial public offering fundraising activities, along with southbound capital flows under Stock Connects, drove stock-related capital inflows, keeping the Hong Kong dollar near the 7.75 level and causing the strong-side exchange rate guarantee to be triggered multiple times in 2020. The strong-side exchange rate guarantee was triggered a total of 85 times between April 21 and October 28, with cumulative capital inflows amounting to HK$383.5 billion. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange market operated normally throughout 2020.

src_raw: 總結餘（進行貼現窗活動前）與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2019年底的11,330億港元，增加至2020年底的15,266億港元（圖2）。隨着強方兌換保證被觸發，金管局應銀行要求合共沽出3,835億港元。新冠病毒疫情引致環球宏觀環境波動，金管局為了提供額外港元流動性，亦於4月底及5月初逐步減發總計200億港元外匯基金票據。由於強方兌換保證被觸發及外匯基金票據發行量減少，總結餘（進行貼現窗活動前）由2019年底的543億港元，增加至2020年底的4,575億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由10,787億港元，稍降至10,692億港元，反映外匯基金票據發行量減少，這抵銷了按一貫做法以新發行的外匯基金票據及債券來吸納未償還外匯基金票據及債券的利息。整體貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: Aggregate Balance before Discount Window and the total amount of outstanding foreign exchange fund notes and bonds increased from HKD 11,330 billion at the end of 2019 to HKD 15,266 billion at the end of 2020 (Figure 2). As the linked exchange rate assurance mechanism was triggered, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority sold a total of HKD 3,835 billion in response to bank requests. The COVID-19 pandemic led to volatility in the global macroeconomic environment, and the Hong Kong Monetary Authority gradually reduced the total amount of foreign exchange fund notes by HKD 200 billion in late April and early May to provide additional Hong Kong dollar liquidity. Due to the triggering of the linked exchange rate assurance mechanism and the reduction in the issuance of foreign exchange fund notes, Aggregate Balance before Discount Window increased from HKD 543 billion at the end of 2019 to HKD 4,575 billion at the end of 2020. The total amount of outstanding foreign exchange fund notes and bonds decreased slightly from HKD 10,787 billion to HKD 10,692 billion during the year, reflecting the reduction in the issuance of foreign exchange fund notes, which offset the interest on outstanding foreign exchange fund notes and bonds absorbed by newly issued foreign exchange fund notes and bonds in accordance with established practice. The overall monetary base continued to be fully supported by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 隨着農曆新年假期後流動性需求減退，香港銀行同業拆息在2月普遍下降（圖3）。踏入3月，由於美元資金壓力，連同新股集資相關及季結資金需求等本地因素，香港銀行同業拆息一度上升。其後由於強方兌換保證被觸發及外匯基金票據發行量減少，令總結餘增加，港元流動性狀況逐步紓緩。
mt_raw: Following the decline in liquidity demand after the Lunar New Year holiday, Hong Kong interbank offered rates (HIBOR) generally fell in February (Figure 3). In March, due to dollar funding pressures, along with local factors such as new share capital raising and seasonal settlement demands, HIBOR temporarily rose. Subsequently, the activation of the strong exchange rate guarantee and reduced issuance of foreign exchange fund notes led to an increase in total reserves, gradually easing the Hong Kong dollar liquidity situation.

src_raw: 因應美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍於3月兩度下調，以及反映年內隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息變動，基本利率由年初的2.73厘下降至年底收報0.50厘。在零售層面，儘管美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍調低，銀行仍維持最優惠貸款利率不變。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2019年的383億港元降至2020年的91億港元。
mt_raw: In response to the U.S. Federal Funds Rate target range being lowered twice in March, and reflecting year-end overnight and one-month Hong Kong bank interbank offered rates, the base rate decreased from 2.73% at the beginning of the year to a closing level of 0.50% at year-end. On the retail front, despite the lowering of the U.S. Federal Funds Rate target range, banks maintained their best lending rate unchanged. Overall, Hong Kong's money market continued to operate normally. Discount window borrowing fell from HKD 383 billion in 2019 to HKD 91 billion in 2020.

src_raw: 過去30多年來，聯匯制度一直是香港金融體系的重要支柱，歷經考驗均能展現強大的抵禦衝擊的能力。儘管2020年面對挑戰，港元外匯及貨幣市場保持正常運作，一再證明聯匯制度穩健有效。年內面對一些毫無根據的謠言，質疑聯匯制度以至香港的金融穩定，金管局迅速向公眾重申香港會繼續實施聯匯制度，同時資金自由流動及港幣自由兌換受到《基本法》第112條保障。金管局另又發表多篇文章，闡明逆境下香港金融體系繼續展現強大抵禦衝擊能力的事實。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。香港的金融市場有序運作，以及港元繼續如常作為支付及保值貨幣，反映上述措施有效維持公眾對聯匯制度的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在《2020年對外部門報告》重申香港擁有具透明度的規則、充裕的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融規管與監管、靈活的經濟，以及審慎的財政架構，確保聯匯制度具公信力。
mt_raw: For over 30 years, the Linked Exchange Rate System has been a crucial pillar of Hong Kong's financial system, consistently demonstrating strong resilience against challenges. In 2020, despite facing difficulties, the Hong Kong dollar's foreign exchange and money markets continued to operate normally, repeatedly proving the system's stability and effectiveness. During the year, some baseless rumors questioned the Linked Exchange Rate System and Hong Kong's financial stability. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) swiftly reiterated to the public that Hong Kong would continue to implement the Linked Exchange Rate System, emphasizing that the free flow of capital and the free convertibility of the Hong Kong dollar are protected under Article 112 of the Basic Law. The HKMA also published several articles explaining how Hong Kong's financial system continued to show strong resilience during challenging times. The government remains firmly committed to maintaining the Linked Exchange Rate System. The orderly operation of Hong Kong's financial markets and the continued normal use of the Hong Kong dollar as a medium of payment and store of value reflect the effectiveness of these measures in maintaining public confidence in the Linked Exchange Rate System. The International Monetary Fund reaffirmed in its External Sector Report 2020 that Hong Kong possesses transparent rules, ample fiscal and foreign exchange reserves, sound financial regulation and supervision, a flexible economy, and prudent fiscal structures, ensuring the credibility of the Linked Exchange Rate System.

src_raw: 穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用。儘管新冠病毒疫情構成負面影響，香港銀行體系繼續運作暢順，流動性及資本水平以國際標準而言均非常充裕。為確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力，金管局一直密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行貸款的監管。與此同時，金管局亦為銀行體系提供更多流動性，維持貨幣及金融穩定。除減發外匯基金票據以增加港元流動性外，金管局為銀行設立一系列流動資金安排。此外，金管局與銀行保持聯繫，確保它們在緊張情況時利用這些流動資金安排。因應新冠病毒疫情為環球金融市場帶來波動及不確定因素，金管局推出臨時性美元流動資金安排，為持牌銀行提供美元流動性支援，有助紓緩環球美元銀行拆借市場流動性緊絀的情況。
mt_raw: A sound banking system plays a crucial role in the proper functioning of the exchange rate regime. Despite the negative impact of the coronavirus pandemic, the Hong Kong banking system has continued to operate smoothly, with liquidity and capital levels well above international standards. To ensure the banking system's ability to withstand shocks, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has been closely monitoring banks' credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as the results of stress tests, and maintaining regulation on bank lending. At the same time, the Authority has provided more liquidity to the banking system to maintain monetary and financial stability. In addition to reducing the issuance of Exchange Fund Notes to increase Hong Kong dollar liquidity, the Authority has established a series of liquidity facilities for banks. Furthermore, the Authority has maintained contact with banks to ensure they can utilize these liquidity facilities during periods of stress. In response to the volatility and uncertainties brought about by the coronavirus pandemic in global financial markets, the Authority has introduced temporary US dollar liquidity facilities to provide liquidity support to licensed banks, helping to alleviate the liquidity tightness in the global US dollar interbank lending market.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2020年在109.8至112.1%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日收報109.9%（圖4）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，加上香港穩健的銀行體系，為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強而有力的後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance the transparency of the Monetary Authority's accounts, since October 1998, part of the Foreign Exchange Fund's assets have been designated for use as backing for the money supply. The Backing Ratio, which is the ratio of backing assets to the money supply, fluctuated between 109.8 and 112.1% in 2020, without reaching the upper or lower limits. The ratio closed at 109.9% on December 31 (Figure 4). Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, although certain assets of the Foreign Exchange Fund have been designated as part of the backing portfolio, all assets of the Foreign Exchange Fund can be used to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate. The substantial financial resources of the Foreign Exchange Fund, combined with the sound banking system in Hong Kong, provide a strong backing for the monetary and financial stability of Hong Kong.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會負責監察及探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2020年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括香港經濟的情景分析、香港物業市場的評估、了解跨境資金流的概念架構，以及了解香港銀行同業市場。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Issuance Committee, under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, is responsible for monitoring and examining issues relating to Hong Kong’s currency and financial stability. In 2020, the topics explored by the Currency Issuance Committee included a scenario analysis of the Hong Kong economy, an assessment of the Hong Kong property market, understanding the conceptual framework of cross-border capital flows, and understanding the Hong Kong interbank market. The minutes of the Currency Issuance Committee meetings and the reports on the operation of the Currency Issuance System submitted by the HKMA to it are available on the HKMA website.

src_raw: 疫情持續下，香港貨幣及金融研究中心（研究中心）在2020年仍能維持一定數量的研究成果。在2020年，研究中心合共發表20篇研究論文，涵蓋貨幣政策、銀行體系穩定、市場微觀結構和金融科技發展等廣泛議題，部份論文已獲接納或正被評審在專業期刊中刊登。在疫情下由於要實施社交距離及旅遊限制，研究中心舉辦的研討會、講座及到訪研究計劃等主要活動需要押後，待日後公共衛生和旅遊條件回復正常後，研究中心將會復辦上述活動。
mt_raw: Despite the ongoing pandemic, the Hong Kong Institute for Monetary and Financial Research (HKIMR) was still able to maintain a certain number of research outputs in 2020. In 2020, HKIMR published a total of 20 research papers, covering a wide range of topics including monetary policy, banking stability, market microstructure, and the development of financial technology. Some of these papers have been accepted or are being reviewed for publication in professional journals. Due to the need to implement social distancing and travel restrictions during the pandemic, major activities hosted by HKIMR, such as seminars, lectures, and research visits, had to be postponed. Once public health and travel conditions return to normal, HKIMR will resume these activities.

src_raw: 截至2020年底，流通銀行紙幣（指發鈔銀行發行的紙幣）總值5,595億港元，較上年增加8.3%（圖5、6及7）。政府發行的流通紙幣及硬幣總值127億港元，較上年減少0.6%（圖8及9）。在政府發行的紙幣及硬幣中，10港元流通紙幣總值46億港元，其中塑質鈔票佔79%。
mt_raw: As of the end of 2020, the total value of banknotes in circulation (referring to banknotes issued by issuing banks) amounted to 559.5 billion Hong Kong dollars, representing an 8.3% increase compared to the previous year (Figures 5, 6, and 7). The total value of government-issued banknotes and coins in circulation was 12.7 billion Hong Kong dollars, a 0.6% decrease from the previous year (Figures 8 and 9). Among the government-issued banknotes and coins, the total value of 10 Hong Kong dollar banknotes in circulation was 4.6 billion Hong Kong dollars, of which 79% were polymer notes.

src_raw: 硬幣收集計劃於2014年10月推出，年內繼續廣受大眾歡迎。這是全球首個有系統的流動硬幣收集計劃，設有兩部收銀車輪流停駐全港18區。每部收銀車均裝設兩部高速硬幣點算機，市民可選擇將硬幣轉換成鈔票或用作八達通卡或電子錢包等儲值支付工具增值，亦可將款項放入車內的公益金捐款箱。此外，金管局與香港社會服務聯會合作，在非政府組織賣旗日派出收銀車收集硬幣。收銀車亦到訪學校，增進學生對硬幣收集計劃的認識。過去多年硬幣收集計劃曾獲頒多個本港及國際獎項，對其創新及環保的處理方法予以肯定。
mt_raw: The coin collection program was launched in October 2014 and remained popular throughout the year. It is the world's first systematic mobile coin collection initiative, featuring two coin collection vehicles that take turns stopping in all 18 districts across Hong Kong. Each vehicle is equipped with two high-speed coin counters, allowing citizens to choose to exchange coins for banknotes, or use them to top up stored-value payment tools such as Octopus cards or electronic wallets, or to donate the money into charity donation boxes inside the vehicles. In addition, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) collaborated with the Hong Kong Federation of Youth Groups to deploy the coin collection vehicles on non-governmental organization flag days to collect coins. The collection vehicles also visited schools to raise students' awareness of the coin collection program. Over the years, the coin collection program has received numerous local and international awards, recognizing its innovative and environmentally friendly approach.

src_raw: 儘管新冠病毒疫情爆發為經濟帶來重大挑戰，香港銀行體系於2020年維持穩健。年內金管局除密切留意疫情對銀行營運及監管活動的影響並靈活應變外，繼續將監管重點放在認可機構的信用及流動性風險管理上。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加及銀行業使用金融科技的上升趨勢，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及運作穩健性的監管。金管局亦與銀行及國際組織緊密合作，促進業界過渡至備用參考利率。
mt_raw: Despite the significant challenges posed to the economy by the outbreak of the novel coronavirus pandemic, the Hong Kong banking system remained resilient in 2020. Throughout the year, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) not only closely monitored the impact of the pandemic on banking operations and regulatory activities and flexibly responded to these challenges, but also continued to focus its regulatory efforts on the credit and liquidity risk management of authorized institutions. Given the persistent increase in cyber threats and the rising trend of fintech adoption in the banking sector, the HKMA enhanced its regulatory oversight of the technology risk management and operational resilience of authorized institutions. The HKMA also closely collaborated with banks and international organizations to facilitate the industry's transition to alternative reference rates.

src_raw: 在操守監管方面，金管局給予認可機構在遵守監管規定上彈性處理的空間以及提供指引，以便一方面協助銀行在疫情下的業務運作及繼續為客戶提供服務，另一方面則繼續確保投資者及消費者得到保障。金管局聯同有關當局制定「跨境理財通」業務試點的建議實施細則，並諮詢業界。金管局與證券及期貨事務監察委員會合作，就精簡有關家族辦公室及擁有高資產淨值並精於財務事宜的投資者的銷售程序提供指引。此外，金管局加強對數碼金融服務消費者的保障，並繼續推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: In terms of conduct supervision, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) provides authorized institutions with flexibility in complying with regulatory requirements and offers guidance to assist banks in maintaining business operations and continuing to serve customers during the pandemic, while simultaneously ensuring continued protection for investors and consumers. The HKMA, together with relevant authorities, has formulated proposed implementation details for the Wealth Management Connect pilot scheme and consulted the industry. In collaboration with the Securities and Futures Commission, the HKMA has provided guidance on streamlining sales procedures for family offices and high-net-worth investors who are proficient in financial matters. Additionally, the HKMA has strengthened consumer protection in digital financial services and continues to promote a customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 在打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面，金管局迅速採取行動，不但釐清風險為本方法及科技如何協助認可機構更有效應對與新冠病毒疫情相關的情況，並同時審慎應對持續升溫的地緣政治緊張局勢對銀行體系造成的影響。金管局繼續支持有關提升打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集工作的成效與效率的措施，包括增加參與公私營夥伴共享訊息的認可機構數目，以及支持銀行業採用合規科技。金管局又順應科技及數據運用的國際發展趨勢，展開進一步加強打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集監察能力的計劃。
mt_raw: In combating money laundering and terrorist financing, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has swiftly taken action, not only clarifying how risk-based approaches and technology can help authorized institutions respond more effectively to situations related to the COVID-19 pandemic, but also prudently addressing the impact of escalating geopolitical tensions on the banking system. The HKMA continues to support measures to enhance the effectiveness and efficiency of combating money laundering and terrorist financing, including increasing the number of authorized institutions participating in public-private partnerships for information sharing, and supporting the banking sector’s adoption of compliance technology. Furthermore, in line with international trends in the development and application of technology and data, the HKMA has launched plans to further strengthen its supervisory capabilities in combating money laundering and terrorist financing.

src_raw: 與此同時，金管局與銀行業緊密合作，優化監管政策與程序，以及推行提升人才專業能力的措施。香港在實施國際監管標準方面取得理想進展，包括資本充足標準和披露標準。在促進綠色及可持續銀行業的發展方面，金管局已進入三個階段中的第二階段，正制定相關監管規定。金管局亦繼續致力確保香港備有具公信力的認可機構處置機制，包括制定新處置標準及實施吸收虧損能力規定的規則，以提升認可機構的處置可行性。
mt_raw: At the same time, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority is working closely with the banking sector to optimize regulatory policies and procedures, and to implement measures to enhance the professional capabilities of talent. Hong Kong has made ideal progress in implementing international regulatory standards, including capital adequacy standards and disclosure standards. In promoting the development of green and sustainable banking, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has entered the second phase of three, and is formulating relevant regulatory regulations. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority also continues to commit to ensuring that Hong Kong has credible and recognized institutional resolution mechanisms, including formulating new resolution standards and implementing rules on loss-absorbing capacity requirements, to enhance the feasibility of institutional resolution.

src_raw: 銀行可能因營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、應對危機及自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。
mt_raw: Banks may affect the stability of the banking system through their operational methods, or even through disorderly closures in extreme cases. As a regulatory authority, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) plays a crucial role in safeguarding financial stability, ensuring that banks have the capacity to withstand shocks, respond to crises, and recover to normal operations, ultimately helping to prevent bank failures. The HKMA is responsible for prudential regulation of banks, as well as authorizing Hong Kong's licensed banks, restricted license banks, and deposit-taking companies (collectively referred to as "authorized institutions"). The HKMA also oversees the designation and regulation of certain financial market infrastructure.

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦並非為確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，能有秩序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員在該機制下為認可機構（以及其他類型機構）的處置機制當局。為落實香港的處置機制，必須制定處置規則及政策標準、進行處置規劃以排除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置瀕臨倒閉認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: However, the Financial Secretary cannot guarantee that the financial system will be entirely risk-free, nor is Hong Kong’s prudential regulatory system designed to ensure “zero risk.” As one of the resolution authorities, the Financial Secretary strives to ensure that, should a recognized institution become non-viable, its failure can be managed in an orderly manner. To this end, Hong Kong has established a resolution regime, and the Financial Secretary acts as the resolution authority for recognized institutions (and other types of institutions) under that regime. To implement Hong Kong’s resolution regime, it is necessary to develop resolution rules and policy standards, conduct resolution planning to remove obstacles to the resolvability of recognized institutions, and build the HKMA’s operational capabilities to resolve failing recognized institutions. To effectively carry out the above work, the HKMA adopts approaches that are consistent with and coordinated with international standards.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局亦進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估屬較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行610次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查及評估的主要重點之一。另一個重點是在新冠病毒疫情下的業務操作風險及科技風險管理。此外，金管局又增加針對流動性及市場風險管理的現場審查及專題評估次數。同時，專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查及專題評估。
mt_raw: In addition to off-site reviews, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) also conducts regular on-site inspections, complemented by thematic assessments, to examine areas deemed to be of higher risk. Throughout the year, the HKMA carried out a total of 610 on-site inspections and thematic assessments, continuing to focus on credit risk management as one of the main priorities in its reviews and assessments. Another key focus was operational risk and technology risk management in the context of the COVID-19 pandemic. Furthermore, the HKMA increased the frequency of on-site inspections and thematic assessments related to liquidity and market risk management. At the same time, specialized review teams conducted on-site inspections and thematic assessments of authorized institutions' securities, investment products, insurance, and Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF)-related businesses.

mt_raw: Given the uncertainties related to the COVID-19 pandemic, which have presented significant challenges to the economy, the Financial Supervisory Commission has thoroughly reviewed the asset quality of licensed institutions to assess the trend of deteriorating asset quality. Special stress test analyses conducted by the Commission indicate that banks are capable of withstanding the economic pressures brought about by the COVID-19 pandemic.

src_raw: 因應新冠病毒疫情爆發，金管局於2019年10月成立的銀行業中小企貸款協調機制（協調機制）推出多輪協助企業及個人客戶的紓緩措施，鼓勵銀行在審慎風險管理原則容許下繼續支持借款人的融資需要。其中最主要的是協調機制於5月推出的「預先批核還息不還本」計劃。計劃下合資格的企業客戶的所有貸款本金還款可延期6個月。該計劃在11月延長6個月後，在2021年3月再度延長6個月至10月底。該計劃約有100間銀行參與，覆蓋12萬合資格企業客戶。截至12月底，銀行共批出58,000多宗企業客戶貸款展期及其他支援措施的個案，涉及金額超過7,400億港元。個人客戶方面，銀行亦推出住宅按揭「還息不還本」計劃，「居者有其屋計劃」下資助房屋的相關按揭亦涵蓋在內。此外，銀行亦提供應急貸款予從事受疫情嚴重打擊行業的客戶、延長個人貸款期限，以及下調各種個人信貸的收費。截至12月底，銀行共批出28,000多宗住宅按揭「還息不還本」及其他個人應急貸款的個案，涉及金額超過440億港元。
mt_raw: In response to the outbreak of the novel coronavirus pandemic, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's Banking Sector SME Loan Coordination Mechanism (Coordination Mechanism), established in October 2019, introduced multiple rounds of relief measures to assist both corporate and individual customers, encouraging banks to continue supporting borrowers' financing needs under prudent risk management principles. The most significant initiative was the Coordination Mechanism's launch of the "PPPHS" program in May, which allowed all eligible corporate customers to defer principal repayments for six months. After an initial six-month extension in November, the program was further extended by another six months until the end of October 2021. Approximately 100 banks participated in the program, covering around 120,000 eligible corporate customers. By the end of December, banks had approved over 58,000 cases of corporate loan deferrals and other support measures, involving a total amount exceeding HKD 740 billion. For individual customers, banks also introduced residential mortgage "PPPHS" programs, which included mortgages for properties under the "Home Ownership Scheme." Additionally, banks provided emergency loans to customers in severely affected industries, extended personal loan terms, and reduced fees for various personal credit products. By the end of December, banks had approved over 28,000 cases of residential mortgage "PPPHS" and other personal emergency loan applications, involving a total amount exceeding HKD 44 billion.

src_raw: 金管局自2009年起先後推出多輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已經加強銀行的風險管理及香港銀行體系應對本港樓市一旦突然逆轉的抵禦能力。新批出住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數於2020年12月為57%，而有關按揭成數於2009年9月推出首輪逆周期措施前為64%。2020年新批出住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數有所上升，主要由於當中涉及按揭保險的貸款的佔比有所增加，而這類貸款的按揭成數一般較高。新批出按揭的平均供款與入息比率亦維持在低水平，於12月為37%，而在2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時為41%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Since 2009, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has introduced several rounds of countercyclical macroprudential regulatory measures, which have enhanced banks' risk management and the resilience of the Hong Kong banking system against a sudden reversal in the local property market. The average loan-to-value ratio for new residential mortgage loans was 57% in December 2020, compared to 64% before the first round of countercyclical measures was introduced in September 2009. The average loan-to-value ratio for new residential mortgage loans in 2020 increased mainly because the proportion of mortgages involving mortgage insurance increased, and such mortgages typically have higher loan-to-value ratios. The average debt-to-income ratio for new mortgages also remained at a low level, at 37% in December, compared to 41% when the ratio ceiling was first introduced in August 2010 (Figure 1).

src_raw: 考慮到非住宅物業的價格走勢與交投量、經濟基調及外圍環境等因素，金管局在8月放寬非住宅物業按揭貸款的逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，將這類貸款的適用按揭成數上限上調10個百分點，一般個案的上限由四成上調至五成。
mt_raw: Considering the price trends and transaction volume of non-residential properties, as well as the economic outlook and external environment, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority relaxed its prudential measures designed to counter economic cycles for mortgage loans on non-residential properties in August. The applicable loan-to-value (LTV) ratio limit for these loans was increased by 10 percentage points, raising the limit for general cases from 40% to 50%.

terms: {'新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector'}
src_raw: 因應2020年初爆發新冠病毒疫情，金管局採取連串措施減低疫情對銀行業務運作的影響。有關措施包括要求認可機構檢討其持續業務運作計劃，並採取適當的預防措施，以保障員工與客戶的健康，以及維持重要銀行服務。此外，金管局提醒認可機構加強與員工及客戶的溝通，就其處所可能出現確診個案的情況作好準備，以及制定應對較為嚴峻但可能發生的風險情境的持續業務運作計劃。金管局與業界保持緊密聯繫，又要求認可機構保持警覺，並因應疫情的最新發展及政府的社交距離措施，不時審視其持續業務運作計劃。
mt_raw: In response to the outbreak of the novel coronavirus pandemic in early 2020, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) implemented a series of measures to reduce the impact of the pandemic on banking operations. These measures included requiring authorized institutions to review their business continuity plans and implement appropriate preventive measures to safeguard the health of staff and customers, as well as to maintain essential banking services. Additionally, the HKMA reminded authorized institutions to enhance communication with staff and customers, prepare for potential confirmed cases at their premises, and develop business continuity plans to address more severe but possible risk scenarios. The HKMA maintained close contact with the industry and requested authorized institutions to remain vigilant, regularly reviewing their business continuity plans in light of the latest developments in the pandemic and the government's social distancing measures.

src_raw: 金管局完成對「網絡防衛計劃」的全面檢討及廣泛的業界諮詢後，於11月推出「網絡防衛計劃2.0」，因應海外網絡風險管理的最新做法，進一步提升「網絡防衛計劃」。當中「網絡防衛評估框架」加入了有關網絡事故應對及恢復的最新國際穩健做法。「網絡防衛計劃」下的「專業培訓計劃」方面，資歷認證清單的範圍有所擴大，納入主要海外地區的同等資歷。金管局又向香港銀行公會（銀行公會）提出多項建議，令「網絡風險資訊共享平台」更易於使用。「網絡防衛計劃2.0」於2021年1月1日生效。
mt_raw: Following a comprehensive review of the Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative and extensive industry consultation, the HKMA launched CFI 2.0 in November to further enhance the CFI, taking into account the latest practices in overseas cyber risk management. The Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework has incorporated the latest international sound practices regarding cyber incident response and recovery. Regarding the Professional Development Programme under the CFI, the scope of the qualification accreditation list has been expanded to include equivalent qualifications from major overseas regions. The HKMA has also made a number of recommendations to the Hong Kong Association of Banks (HKAB) to make the Cyber Intelligence Sharing Platform more user-friendly. CFI 2.0 came into effect on January 1, 2021.

src_raw: 經過在「金融科技監管沙盒」進行嚴謹的測試與試行後，所有在2019年獲發銀行牌照的8間虛擬銀行都已經於年內開業。虛擬銀行運用創新科技，提供全新的客戶體驗，例如利用大數據分析進行中小企貸款的信貸評估，以加快貸款批核程序。為加強客戶參與及建立客戶對品牌的忠誠，部分虛擬銀行更在其定期存款及獎賞計劃等服務中加入遊戲元素。
mt_raw: After rigorous testing and trials within the Fintech Supervisory Sandbox, all eight virtual banks that were granted banking licenses in 2019 have commenced operations within the year. Virtual banks leverage innovative technologies to provide a new customer experience, such as using big data analytics for credit assessment of SME loans to expedite the loan approval process. To enhance customer engagement and build brand loyalty, some virtual banks have further incorporated gamification elements into their services, such as fixed deposits and reward programs.

src_raw: 香港位處內地金融市場對外開放的要衝，能充分把握開放過程中的契機。憑藉世界級的市場基建以及「滬港通」、「深港通」與「債券通」，香港既是深受內地企業垂青的集資平台，亦是國際投資者進入增長迅速的內地市場的窗口。年內在促進粵港澳大灣區金融合作，尤其便利香港居民在大灣區內使用金融及銀行服務方面取得良好進展。
mt_raw: Hong Kong, strategically positioned as a key gateway for the opening of China’s financial markets, is well-placed to fully leverage the opportunities this process presents. With world-class market infrastructure and initiatives such as Shanghai-Hong Kong Connect, Shenzhen-Hong Kong Connect, and Bond Connect, Hong Kong serves as a preferred capital-raising platform for mainland enterprises and a vital access point for international investors seeking to enter the rapidly growing mainland market. Significant progress has been made this year in promoting financial cooperation within the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, particularly in facilitating Hong Kong residents’ use of financial and banking services within the region.

src_raw:
為鞏固香港的亞洲金融科技樞紐地位，金管局繼續致力實施各項措施，促進銀行及支付行業開發與應用科技。年內的主要進展包括：
- 推動更廣泛使用快速支付系統「轉數快」；
- 促進銀行業實施開放應用程式介面（開放API）；
- 連接貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」與中國人民銀行（人民銀行）轄下的貿易金融區塊鏈平台，促進貿易融資數碼化；
- 研究央行數碼貨幣於跨境支付的應用；
- 探討「商業數據通」的技術可行性及研究新類型信貸評分模型，以助中小型企業（中小企）獲取融資；
- 公布旨在發展更具規模及更多元的合規科技生態圈的兩年計劃，進一步推動合規科技的應用；
- 加強培育人才；及
- 推進跨境金融科技合作。

src_raw: 隨着主要金融市場指數開始加入內地在岸證券或增加其權重，流入人民幣資產的資金繼續加快步伐。香港得天獨厚，憑藉連繫內地資本市場的「滬港通」、「深港通」及「債券通」，在促進國際投資者增加人民幣資產配置方面發揮關鍵的作用。在2020年，「債券通」平均每日交易額增加82%，至約193億元人民幣。為完善「債券通」運作，金管局推出新措施，包括新設特別結算周期服務、延長交易時間及引入新安排，讓投資者在選擇銀行進行貨幣兌換與外幣對沖方面有較多彈性。繼「債券通」北向通取得成功，金管局又與人民銀行組成工作小組研究南向通的框架。
mt_raw: As major financial market indices begin to include onshore Chinese securities or increase their weightings, inflows into RMB assets continue to accelerate. Hong Kong enjoys a unique advantage, leveraging its links to the mainland capital market through the Shanghai-Hong Kong Connect, Shenzhen-Hong Kong Connect, and Bond Connect, playing a key role in encouraging international investors to increase their allocation of RMB assets. In 2020, the average daily transaction value of Bond Connect rose by 82%, reaching approximately RMB 19.3 billion. To enhance the operation of Bond Connect, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority introduced new measures, including the establishment of a special settlement cycle service, extended trading hours, and new arrangements offering investors greater flexibility in selecting banks for currency exchange and foreign exchange hedging. Following the successful implementation of the Northbound trading under Bond Connect, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, together with the People's Bank of China, formed a working group to study the framework for Southbound trading.

src_raw: 金管局亦繼續致力加強香港與粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）內地城市之間的金融配套措施。內地當局公布一系列政策措施，支持區內金融發展。於6月，人民銀行、金管局與澳門金融管理局（澳門金管局）聯合宣布決定實施跨境「理財通」。金管局一直與內地和本地當局以及業界緊密合作，制定有關實施細則。金管局亦就其他措施與內地當局保持聯繫，尋求為香港銀行擴大政策空間拓展更廣闊的跨境業務範疇。年內，香港繼續保持作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐的地位。香港的人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額創出1.2萬億元人民幣的新高。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) continues to work to enhance financial facilitation measures between Hong Kong and mainland cities within the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area (GBA). Mainland authorities have announced a series of policy measures to support financial development in the region. In June, the PBoC, the HKMA, and the Monetary Authority of Macao jointly announced a decision to implement the cross-border Wealth Management Connect (WMC). The HKMA has been working closely with mainland and local authorities, as well as the industry, to formulate detailed implementation rules. The HKMA is also maintaining communication with mainland authorities regarding other measures, seeking to expand policy space for Hong Kong banks to broaden the scope of their cross-border business. Throughout the year, Hong Kong has continued to maintain its position as a global offshore RMB business hub. The average daily transaction volume of Hong Kong’s RMB Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) system reached a new high of RMB 1.2 trillion.

src_raw: 自2018年9月轉數快推出以來，已有35間銀行及12間儲值支付工具營運商加入，其中在2020年增加了5間銀行及1間儲值支付工具營運商。轉數快使用量亦穩步增長。截至12月31日，轉數快共錄得690萬個登記（圖1）。為方便市民收取由機構發出的款項，轉數快於12月6日起新增以香港身份證號碼作帳戶識別代號。引入這項功能後不足1個月已錄得超過110,000個登記。這項新功能並非用於個人對個人轉帳，只供已有收款人身份證號碼的機構發放款項（例如發放薪酬）之用。由於每名市民的身份證號碼都是獨一無二，市民利用香港身份證號碼作為帳戶識別代號，即使不提供銀行帳戶號碼都能夠確保準確收取款項。
mt_raw: Since its launch in September 2018, Faster Payment System has attracted the participation of 35 banks and 12 e-money operators, with five additional banks and one e-money operator joining in 2020. Faster Payment usage has also steadily increased. As of December 31, Faster Payment had recorded a total of 6.9 million registrations (Figure 1). To facilitate the public in receiving payments from institutions, Faster Payment introduced the use of Hong Kong Identity Card numbers as account identifiers starting December 6. Within a month of introducing this feature, over 110,000 registrations were recorded. This new function is not for person-to-person transfers but is intended for institutions to make payments to recipients whose Hong Kong Identity Card numbers are known (e.g., salary disbursements). Since each citizen's Hong Kong Identity Card number is unique, using it as an account identifier ensures accurate receipt of payments without needing to provide bank account numbers.

terms: {'交易量': 'transaction volume', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19'}
src_raw: 新冠病毒疫情及保持社交距離措施為使用電子支付服務帶來新動力。年內轉數快交易量增長尤其迅速（圖2），於2020年12月的平均每日交易量達505,000宗即時交易（涉及52億港元及9,500萬元人民幣），相當於2019年12月168,000宗的3倍，更是2018年10月轉數快推出首月的10倍。轉數快使用量增加，亦受惠於應用範圍逐步擴大，由最初主要用作個人對個人支付，逐步擴展至繳付帳單（包括政府帳單）、零售及商業支付。
mt_raw: The COVID-19 pandemic and social distancing measures have provided new momentum for the use of electronic payment services. The volume of Faster Payments transactions grew particularly rapidly this year (Figure 2), reaching an average of 505,000 daily instant transactions in December 2020 (involving HK$5.2 billion and RMB 95 million), which is three times the 168,000 transactions in December 2019, and ten times the volume in the first month of Faster Payments’ launch in October 2018. The increased use of Faster Payments has also benefited from the gradual expansion of its application scope, which initially focused on person-to-person payments and has since expanded to include bill payments (including government bills), retail, and business payments.

src_raw: 金管局與多個政府部門及銀行業一直合作，將轉數快的應用範圍由個人對個人支付，擴展至繳付帳單及其他商戶支付。政府於2019年11月起接受以轉數快繳付帳單，以推廣使用轉數快及便利市民。市民以支援轉數快的手機銀行或電子錢包掃描印於帳單上的二維碼，即可輕鬆繳付稅款、差餉及地租、水費及政府發出的一般繳費單。截至2020年12月經轉數快繳付政府帳單的交易達180萬宗，涉及22億港元。繼繳付政府帳單服務成功推出後，再有4個政府部門由2020年12月21日起接受在指定繳費櫃枱及自助服務機以轉數快二維碼繳費。政府亦正在探討於網上採用轉數快付款的安排。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has been cooperating with various government departments and the banking sector to expand the application scope of the Faster Payment System (FPS) from person-to-person payments to bill payments and other merchant payments. The government started accepting FPS for bill payments in November 2019 to promote its use and provide convenience to citizens. Citizens can easily pay taxes, rates and government rent, water charges, and general government bills by scanning the QR codes printed on the bills using their mobile banking or e-wallets that support FPS. As of December 2020, 1.8 million government bill payments were made via FPS, involving HK$2.2 billion. Following the successful launch of the government bill payment service, four more government departments began accepting FPS QR code payments at designated counters and self-service kiosks from December 21, 2020. The government is also exploring arrangements for adopting FPS payments online.

src_raw: 另一正面的發展是越來越多大小商戶採用轉數快以加強業務營運。支付商戶的交易在2020年12月急增至平均每日100,000宗，較2019年12月增加38倍轉數快普遍用作繳付帳單、應用程式內直接扣帳，以及進行其他網上購物。電子錢包日益普及，亦帶動了以轉數快為帳戶增值的交易量顯著增長。2020年12月平均每日增值的交易量，是2019年12月的7倍。
mt_raw: A positive development is that an increasing number of businesses of all sizes are adopting Tap & Go to enhance their business operations. The number of transactions by payment merchants surged sharply in December 2020, reaching an average of 100,000 transactions per day, a 38-fold increase compared to December 2019. Tap & Go is commonly used for bill payments, direct deductions within applications, and other online shopping activities. The growing popularity of electronic wallets has also driven a significant increase in transactions that add value to Tap & Go accounts. The average daily volume of value-adding transactions in December 2020 was seven times that of December 2019.

src_raw: 為加強市民對轉數快的認識，金管局製作各類教育及宣傳資料，包括電視廣告及在社交媒體平台提供一系列精明使用錦囊。金管局亦舉辦中學生Whatsapp Stickers設計比賽，增加他們對電子支付的認識。此外，金管局向多個慈善團體及街市營運商推廣使用轉數快收付款項。多間參與轉數快的銀行及儲值支付工具營運商亦推出宣傳活動，包括提供優惠，吸引客戶登記及利用轉數快轉帳及支付帳單。在2020年的成果上，金管局在2021年初與銀行及儲值支付工具營運商合作，推廣透過轉數快以電子方式派利是。一方面金管局推出宣傳活動，另一方面銀行及儲值支付工具營運商則提供優惠，鼓勵客戶以電子方式派利是，既環保又有助抗疫。
mt_raw: To enhance public awareness of the Faster Payment System, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has produced various educational and promotional materials, including television advertisements and a series of smart usage tips on social media platforms. The HKMA also organized a secondary school WhatsApp Sticker Design Competition to increase students' understanding of electronic payments. Additionally, the HKMA has promoted the use of the Faster Payment System for payments and collections among multiple charitable organizations and market operators. Several participating banks and electronic money operators have also launched promotional campaigns, offering discounts to encourage customers to register and use the Faster Payment System for transfers and bill payments. Building on the achievements of 2020, the HKMA collaborated with banks and electronic money operators at the beginning of 2021 to promote the electronic distribution of red envelopes via the Faster Payment System. On one hand, the HKMA launched promotional activities, while on the other hand, banks and electronic money operators provided discounts to encourage customers to send red envelopes electronically, which is both eco-friendly and helps combat the pandemic.

src_raw: 央行數碼貨幣方面，金管局與泰國中央銀行繼續進行聯合研究，探討央行數碼貨幣於跨境支付的應用藉此促進香港與泰國兩地銀行之間港元和泰銖的外匯交易同步交收。雙方完成第一階段研究，並於1月發表聯合報告闡述主要研究結果；另亦開發以區塊鏈為基礎的跨境走廊網絡原型，致力提高跨境支付的效率及降低成本。項目第二階段已展開，旨在探討跨境貿易結算及資本市場交易的商業應用案例。其他央行亦對項目深感興趣。國際結算銀行、阿拉伯聯合酋長國中央銀行和人民銀行數字貨幣研究所於2021年初宣布參與項目。
mt_raw: Regarding central bank digital currencies, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority and the Bank of Thailand continue to conduct joint research, exploring the application of central bank digital currencies in cross-border payments to facilitate the simultaneous settlement of Hong Kong dollar and Thai baht foreign exchange transactions between banks in Hong Kong and Thailand. The two sides have completed the first phase of research and published a joint report in January outlining the main research findings; they have also developed a prototype cross-border corridor network based on blockchain technology, striving to improve the efficiency and reduce the cost of cross-border payments. The second phase of the project has commenced, aiming to explore commercial use cases for cross-border trade settlement and capital market transactions. Other central banks have also expressed strong interest in the project. The Bank for International Settlements, the Central Bank of the United Arab Emirates, and the Digital Currency Institute of the People's Bank of China announced their participation in the project in early 2021.

src_raw: 2020年是峰迴路轉的一年，新冠病毒疫情為全球經濟帶來前所未有的挑戰。資產市場於第1 季經歷了大幅調整和震盪後，在主要央行推出超寬鬆的貨幣政策及各地政府實施大規模的財政紓困措施帶動下，得以迅速反彈。由於主要央行大幅下調基準利率並重啟量化寬鬆措施，令國債收益率顯著下跌、債券價格上升。在此投資環境下，外匯基金在2020 年錄得2,358 億港元的投資收入，回報率為5.3%。
mt_raw: 2020 was a pivotal year, as the novel coronavirus pandemic brought unprecedented challenges to the global economy. After experiencing sharp adjustments and volatility in the first quarter, asset markets quickly rebounded, driven by ultra-loose monetary policies introduced by major central banks and large-scale fiscal relief measures implemented by governments around the world. As major central banks significantly cut benchmark interest rates and restarted quantitative easing, government bond yields fell sharply while bond prices rose. Under this investment environment, the foreign exchange fund recorded an investment income of 235.8 billion Hong Kong dollars in 2020, with a return rate of 5.3%.

src_raw:
外匯基金諮詢委員會為外匯基金制定下列投資目標：
(a) 保障資本；
(b) 確保整體貨幣基礎在任何時候都由流通性極高的美元資產提供十足支持；
(c) 確保流動資金足以維持貨幣及金融穩定；以及
(d) 在符合上述(a)至(c)項的前提下盡量爭取投資回報，以保障基金的長期購買力。

src_raw: 外匯基金大致上分成兩個主要組合：支持組合及投資組合。支持組合持有流通性極高的美元資產，按照貨幣發行局制度的規定為貨幣基礎提供十足支持。投資組合主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員國的債市及股市，以保障資產的價值及長期購買力。
mt_raw: The foreign exchange fund is generally divided into two main portfolios: supporting portfolio and investment portfolio. The supporting portfolio holds highly liquid U.S. dollar assets, providing ample support for the currency base as stipulated by the currency issuance system. The investment portfolio primarily invests in the bond and stock markets of member countries of the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development to safeguard asset value and long-term purchasing power.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產配置於較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一，以及未來基金存款與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To more effectively manage risks and enhance long-term returns, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority is gradually and prudently allocating part of the Foreign Exchange Fund's assets into more diversified asset classes, including emerging market and mainland bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate. Emerging market and mainland bonds and equities are held by the investment portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held by the long-term growth portfolio. The market value cap of the long-term growth portfolio is set at one-third of the accumulated surplus of the Foreign Exchange Fund, as well as the total amount of funds linked to the long-term growth portfolio from future fund deposits and deposits of the Foreign Exchange Fund's affiliated companies.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，會以投資基準方式反映，亦即外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，透過戰略性的資產配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內管理倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The investment process of the Exchange Fund is based on both strategic asset allocation and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation is reflected through an investment benchmark, which refers to the long-term asset allocation that the Exchange Fund can make in order to achieve its investment objectives. The Exchange Fund uses strategic allocation as a guide, and through tactical asset allocation, it aims to achieve returns that exceed the benchmark. Therefore, the actual allocation often deviates from the benchmark allocation (i.e., the strategic allocation), and the difference between the actual allocation and the benchmark allocation is referred to as "tactical deviations." The Financial Secretary sets the investment benchmarks and tracking error limits after consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, and the Hong Kong Monetary Authority is authorized to determine the strategic asset allocation and set the allowable range of tactical deviations. Portfolio managers can manage their portfolios within the allowable range of tactical deviations to profit from short-term market fluctuations.

mt_raw: In addition to managing assets through internal staff, the Financial Supervisory Commission also hires external investment managers to manage approximately 28% of the foreign exchange fund's assets, including all listed stock portfolios and other special assets. The purpose of hiring external investment managers is to utilize the best professional investment talent in the market for the foreign exchange fund's investments, obtain sustainable returns, and allow the foreign exchange fund to benefit from diversified and complementary investment approaches, as well as learn market insights and specialized investment knowledge.

src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，風險管理的重要性不言而喻。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂下嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並設立嚴謹的風險監察及合規制度。金管局為投資相關活動設有三重防線以確保有效的風險管理及監察。金管局亦定期監察主要投資風險類別（包括信用、市場、流動性及業務操作風險），並已加強風險管理程序以配合外匯基金的多元化投資。
mt_raw: The investment environment is becoming increasingly complex, making the importance of risk management self-evident. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has established strict control measures and investment guidelines for investment portfolios managed by both internal and external investment managers, and implemented rigorous risk monitoring and compliance systems. The HKMA has set up three lines of defense for investment-related activities to ensure effective risk management and oversight. The HKMA also regularly monitors major investment risk categories (including credit, market, liquidity, and operational risks), and has enhanced its risk management procedures to align with the diversified investments of the foreign exchange fund.

src_raw: 金管局訂有一套原則，以評估外匯基金投資項目的ESG風險與機會。就外聘投資經理所管理的資產組合而言，金管局透過獲委任的投資經理執行負責任投資。在甄選、委任及監察外聘投資經理的過程中，金管局會評估其落實ESG的不同範疇，包括ESG管治方面的組織架構、ESG標準及政策、將ESG因素併入投資程序中的情況，以及管理督導的業務活動，即代理投票和與投資組合公司的溝通（例如與投資組合公司管理層商討ESG的事宜）。為彰顯對負責任投資的重視，金管局透過外聘投資經理在管理督導方面扮演的角色，推動更完善的ESG做法。負責管理金管局的香港股票組合及中國內地股票主動投資管理組合的外聘投資經理，須承諾遵守證券及期貨事務監察委員會頒布的《負責任的擁有權原則》，若未能遵守則須作出解釋。至於負責管理已發展市場股票組合的外聘投資經理則需恪守國際公認的ESG標準。此外，金管局又展開聘任後監察計劃，以審視外聘投資經理的代理投票及與投資組合公司溝通的落實概況。
mt_raw: The HKMA has established a set of principles to assess ESG risks and opportunities associated with the Foreign Exchange Fund's investment projects. Regarding assets managed by external investment managers, the HKMA implements responsible investment through appointed investment managers. In the process of selecting, appointing, and monitoring external investment managers, the HKMA evaluates their implementation of ESG aspects, including organizational structure for ESG governance, ESG standards and policies, integration of ESG factors into investment processes, and business activities related to management oversight, such as proxy voting and communication with portfolio companies (e.g., discussing ESG matters with portfolio company management). To demonstrate its commitment to responsible investment, the HKMA promotes more comprehensive ESG practices by leveraging the role of external investment managers in management oversight. External investment managers responsible for managing the HKMA's Hong Kong equities portfolio and China mainland equities active investment management portfolio must commit to adhering to the "Responsible Ownership Principles" issued by the Securities and Futures Ordinance. If they fail to comply, they must provide explanations. For external investment managers managing portfolios of developed market equities, they are required to abide by internationally recognized ESG standards. In addition, the HKMA has initiated a post-employment monitoring program to review the implementation of proxy voting and communication with portfolio companies by external investment managers.

src_raw: 至於在公開市場的ESG投資，金管局自2015年起投資於綠色、社會責任及可持續債券（ESG債券），是這個市場的早期投資者之一。此外，金管局亦參與國際金融公司的「聯合貸款組合管理計劃」，而其投資對象聚焦於新興市場的可持續發展項目。在2020年，適逢市場供應增加，金管局增加ESG債券的投資。展望未來，金管局將繼續透過直接投資或持有ESG債券基金等方式，壯大其ESG債券組合。此外，金管局將透過採納ESG股票指數作為被動投資組合的投資基準，推動外聘投資經理建立以ESG為主題的股票投資方針。金管局在未來幾年將會繼續留意以ESG為主題的投資機會，例如主動式的ESG投資組合及低碳為題的投資工具。
mt_raw: Regarding ESG investments in the public market, the Monetary Authority has been investing in green, social responsibility, and sustainable bonds (ESG bonds) since 2015, making it one of the early investors in this market. In addition, the Monetary Authority has participated in the International Finance Corporation's "Managed Co-Lending Portfolio Program," with its investments focusing on sustainable projects in emerging markets. In 2020, as market supply increased, the Monetary Authority expanded its investment in ESG bonds. Looking ahead, the Monetary Authority will continue to grow its ESG bond portfolio through direct investments or by holding ESG bond funds. Furthermore, it will promote external investment managers to establish ESG-themed stock investment strategies by adopting ESG stock indices as benchmarks for passive investment portfolios. In the coming years, the Monetary Authority will continue to monitor ESG-related investment opportunities, such as active ESG investment portfolios and low-carbon investment tools.

src_raw: 私募市場投資方面，金管局在盡職審查過程中檢視專責合夥人的ESG政策及具體措施。金管局的長期增長組合積極投資於具備可持續特點的項目，包括可再生能源基建，而在房地產投資組合亦有吸納具有綠色及可持續特點的倉庫及其他建築物。金管局將在未來繼續物色具備可持續特點的項目，並在房地產投資方面將綠色認證列入為重要考慮因素。金管局與專責合夥人舉行年度ESG工作坊，就良好的ESG作業手法交流意見及經驗。在11月舉行的ESG工作坊上，一眾專責合夥人就新冠病毒疫情對其投資組合公司及ESG投資發展所造成的影響交換意見。為提高私募市場投資的ESG透明度，金管局已要求專責合夥人提供有關其投資項目的ESG資訊，例如氣候變化風險等，以便監察。
mt_raw: In terms of private market investments, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) reviews the ESG policies and specific measures of designated partners during the due diligence process. The HKMA’s long-term growth portfolio actively invests in projects with sustainable characteristics, including renewable energy infrastructure, and its real estate investment portfolio also incorporates warehouses and other buildings with green and sustainable features. The HKMA will continue to seek projects with sustainable characteristics in the future and will include green certifications as an important consideration in real estate investments. The HKMA holds annual ESG workshops with designated partners to exchange views and experiences on good ESG practices. At the ESG workshop held in November, designated partners exchanged views on the impact of the novel coronavirus pandemic on their portfolio companies and the development of ESG investments. To enhance ESG transparency in private market investments, the HKMA has requested designated partners to provide ESG information regarding their investment projects, such as climate change risks, for monitoring purposes.
